name: punch-200-stress
description: Run 200 real server-authoritative punches in five bounded batches across center, edge, corner, tunnel, rubble, and high-power conditions.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local r=c:Invoke('StressPunchCase',{name='center',x=-2,power=15,cycles=8,attempts=5,resetTotal=true,expectedTotal=40}) return H:JSONEncode(r)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local r=c:Invoke('StressPunchCase',{name='edge',x=18,power=6000,cycles=8,attempts=5,expectedTotal=80}) return H:JSONEncode(r)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local r=c:Invoke('StressPunchCase',{name='corner',x=20,targetX=-2,power=6000,cycles=8,attempts=5,expectedTotal=120}) return H:JSONEncode(r)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local r=c:Invoke('StressPunchCase',{name='tunnel',x=-2,power=1500000000,cycles=8,attempts=5,expectedTotal=160}) return H:JSONEncode(r)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local r=c:Invoke('StressPunchCase',{name='rubble',x=2,power=1500000000,rubble=true,cycles=8,attempts=5,expectedTotal=200}) return H:JSONEncode(r)

steps.label: rubble batch valid and total is 200
